cases.expected: Selecting a callback row updates the detail plane without leaving /workspace/callbacks.
Starting a governed attempt creates one live ladder entry and disables further initiate taps.
Repair-required route health suppresses stale callback promise language and promotes repair in place.
Voicemail does not unlock terminal action until the required evidence set is complete.
No-answer outcome only becomes recordable after route and provider evidence are checked.
Answered outcome requires route, provider, acknowledgement, and classification evidence before recording.
Reload restores selected callback row, selected attempt anchor, and repair or outcome stage when recoverable.
Blocked callback posture keeps the shell visible while freezing writable outcome capture.
